ignore.reason: Lowercase letter indicates transition in narrative form.
Matched text is the continuation of a title after an interjection.
The apostrophe is part of the name of the book.
This is a multi-line valediction in which each line is offset slightly differently. Using spans is the best way to do this.
This is a multi-line valediction in which each line is offset slightly differently. Using spans is the best way to do this.
Matched text is a cipher and not a typo.
